summary: Low‑fidelity soundcheck recording but boasts a killer Friend of the Devil and an electrifying Space → Not Fade Away transition.
review: The tape suffers from very poor audio quality – reviewers call it "absolute shit recording" – yet fans rave about the performance, especially the unforgettable Friend of the Devil and the seamless Space into Not Fade Away. Because it’s a rare Dicks Pick, listeners are willing to overlook the technical flaws and consider it a favorite despite the sound.

ai_rating.rationale: Show performance is praised (5‑star) while recording quality is condemned (1‑star). Weighted blend (70% show, 30% recording) yields a moderate‑high rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the audio as "absolute shit" and note low fidelity; likely a rough soundcheck capture with significant clarity issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Even as a soundcheck, the set flows well enough to feature a memorable Space into Not Fade Away transition.
